title: Low Shield
description: Lower your shield for a visible view!
body:
![Comparison](https://imgur.com/E7tzOar.png) [![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-shield-pack) [![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/low-shield) > #### Low Shield simply reduces the height of the shield in first-person, making sure it doesn't block your view during your gameplay, especially during combat. - **Shield is lowered by 2.75 units and blocking is lowered by 3 units respectively.** - **[[MC-98631](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-98631)] Fixed a bug where the shield on the right hand appears higher than the left (1.21.11 and below).**
### How it works 🧠 - The shield’s position is lowered by adjusting some **Y** value changes in the model file making sure that it always appears low when blocking or just held. ##### This resource pack is always up to date and regularly tested to check for version compatibility, new file updates, and bugs. ### License **(ARR)** 📜
License - Feel free to use, modify, or share this project in any of your modpacks or resource packs as long as proper credit is given to me. - You may not sell or use this resource pack in any way that requires payment to access it. ##### For any other concerns, feel free to message me on discord **(@Oculie)**.
